nodes.body: Closing: implementation shipped. Page-orientation detection lives in pd_book_tools/ocr/rotation.py, consumed by Document.from_image_ocr_via_doctr (auto_rotate=True default). Documented in docs/specs/02-rotation.md. Parent spec issue #26 is already closed. roadmap.md notes 'Page rotation — already shipped'.

issue.body:
Filed from the pd-book-tools deep code/security review.

Report: `docs/research/2026-05-22-deep-code-security-review.md`
Finding: #30

Moved from mistakenly filed meta issue: ConcaveTrillion/ocr-container-meta#323

Evidence:

- `scripts/ai-filter-log.py:72`

The script reads the entire log file before filtering.

Impact:

- Very large CI logs can consume excessive memory/CPU.

Remediation:

- Stream the file or cap accepted input size.

---
This issue was filed from a read-only review. Confirm behavior with a focused failing test before implementation where practical.
issue.title: pd-book-tools: whole-log reads in AI log filter can consume excessive memory
